Money Stuff =0A Programming note: This is the last Money Stuff of 2024. Hap=
py holidays, and =0Athanks so much for reading this year. We=E2=80=99ll be =
back on Monday, J =0A=0A=0A <> =0A =0A<https://sli.bloomberg.com/click=3Fs=

&p=3D12192024>=0A=0A=0AProgramming note: This is the last Money Stuff of 20=
24. Happy holidays, and =0Athanks so much for reading this year. We=E2=80=
=99ll be back on Monday, Jan. 6, 2025.=0A=0A=0ANarrow banking=0A=0AOne of t=
he big stories of modern finance is the rise of narrow banking <> in =0Athe=
 form of private credit. =E2=80=9CNarrow banking=E2=80=9D is, in banking th=
eory,roughly <> =0Athe idea that banks shouldn=E2=80=99t make loans. Instea=
d:=0A=0A * Banks should take money from depositors and keep it somewhere ve=
ry safe. =0AAfter all, the depositors might ask for their money back at any=
 time, and it =0Awould be a crisis if the banks didn=E2=80=99t have it. So =
if you deposit money in a =0Abank, the bank should just keep your cash in a=
n envelope with your name on it. =0AOr, more practically, the bank should k=
